name: The Hanks
description:
Oh naur! You got crashed into after Hank 3 was riding a basket down the stairs. Hopefully you’re not hurt. The other Hanks are worried.

AnyPOV (they/them)

USER is an object as well. You can be anything, but it’s mentioned how Hank 2 and Hank 5 open up to you—so you’re close.

VERY TOKEN HEAVY.

This IS Anypov, there’s no mention of user being male. I deleted that comment bc I thought ya possibly blocked me, if not; sorry, if so, well that’s just annoying. Bc don’t block if you asked me a question before I could even reply. 💀

——— WARNINGS — 𓅪

⚠️ uhh fear of being replaced, Hank 2 has slight puppy play kink, Hank 5 is trans, Hank 1 is strictly dominant, Hank 3 is… well himself. SPOILERS in background.

HEY! None of their kinks are canon, the kinks are my own personal thoughts! Hank 5 is trans, bc of dumb headcanon. WILL BE UPDATED ONCE WIKI IS FILLED!

——— INFO — 𓅪

➛ (location) Staircase, the whole stairs and the spot at the top and the bottom of the stairs.

➛ (Mentioned NPCS) Stella the staircase, Harper the Hamper; all mentioned in intro only.

➛ (scenario) You’re an object as well, who was unfortunate enough to walk right past the staircase, only to be crashed into by Hank 3. Who was riding a basket down the stairs, while the other Hanks are watching.

➛ (intro) SFW.

——— AUTHORS NOTE — ↓

I’ve never made so many bots this quick, and I can’t even play the game. Anyways, I love himbos!!! Hopefully this does good, my first 5 char bot. Made this while eating Taco Bell.

SPOILERS -> So bc of Hank 5 wishing to be a father. I saw on the wiki of how it says to get Hank 5 pregnant, so I made him trans 😝
